info.title: Hogwarts Academy API
info.description: API documentation for the Hogwarts Academy Classroom Management System. All endpoints require a valid session granted by the Ministry of Magic (Better Auth).

name.description: Name of the class (e.g., 'Advanced Patronus Workshop')

inviteCode.description: Joining code students use to enroll (e.g., 'LUMOS2024')

subjectId.description: ID of the spell/subject this class covers

professorId.description: ID of the professor teaching this class

bannerCldPubId.description: Cloudinary public ID for class banner image

capacity.description: Maximum number of students allowed in the class

status.description: active = currently running, inactive = not yet started, archived = completed

Department.description: A magical discipline at Hogwarts (e.g., Potions, Transfiguration, Defense Against the Dark Arts)

name.description: Full department name (e.g., 'Defense Against the Dark Arts')

Enrollment.description: Records a student's enrollment in a class. A student cannot be enrolled in the same class twice.

enrolledAt.description: Timestamp when the student joined the class

EnrollmentCreate.description: Enroll the authenticated student in a class by class ID

EnrollmentJoin.description: Enroll in a class using a professor-provided joining code (e.g., 'LUMOS2024')

inviteCode.description: The joining code shared by the professor (e.g., 'EXPECTO2024')

Subject.description: A spell or magical subject taught within a department (e.g., 'Patronus Charm', 'Polyjuice Potion')

name.description: Name of the spell or subject (e.g., 'Patronus Charm')

User.description: A Hogwarts Academy user — student, professor, or headmaster

role.description: headmaster = full platform access | professor = create classes & award points | student = enroll & view

Schedule.description: A single class session time slot

day.description: Day of week (e.g., Mon, Tue, Wed)

Pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by all list endpoints

totalSubjects.description: Number of subjects (spells) within this department

classes.description: Total active classes running under this department

enrolledStudents.description: Total students enrolled across all classes in this department

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's session. Like checking your Hogwarts acceptance letter is still valid.

200.description: Active session info, or null if unauthenticated

oneOf.description: No active session — user must sign in

post.description: Authenticates a Hogwarts user and sets a session cookie. Like saying 'Alohomora' to unlock the gates.
Clears the session cookie. The Marauder's Map goes blank.
Creates a new account and signs the user in. Like receiving your owl-delivered Hogwarts acceptance letter for the first time.
Updates the authenticated user's own profile (name, avatar, etc.)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Hogwarts classes with optional filters. Accessible by all authenticated roles.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by class name or joining code

post.description: Professors and headmasters can create a new Hogwarts class. A unique joining code is required (e.g., 'LUMOS2024').

get.summary: Look up class by joining code
get.description: Retrieve a class using its professor-issued joining code (e.g., 'LUMOS2024'). Accessible by all authenticated roles.

404.description: Invalid joining code — class not found

get.description: Retrieve a specific class by ID. Accessible by all authenticated roles.

put.description: Update class details. Only the professor who owns the class or the headmaster can do this.

delete.description: Permanently removes a class. Only professors (own classes) or headmaster.

get.description: Returns the members of a class. Professors use this to view their student roster.
Returns a paginated list of Hogwarts magical disciplines (e.g., Potions, Charms, DADA). Accessible by all authenticated roles.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by department name or code

post.description: Only the headmaster can establish new magical disciplines at Hogwarts.

get.description: Returns the department with its subject count, class count, and enrolled student totals.

put.description: Only the headmaster can update department details.

delete.description: Only the headmaster can delete departments. Use with caution — this affects all subjects and classes beneath it.

get.summary: List professors and students in a department

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all enrollments. Accessible by headmaster and professors.

post.summary: Enroll in a class by class ID
post.description: Enrolls the authenticated student in a class. Student ID is taken automatically from the session.

409.description: Student already enrolled in this class

post.summary: Join a class using a joining code
post.description: Enrolls the authenticated student using a professor-issued joining code (e.g., 'LUMOS2024').

201.description: Student has joined the class via joining code

404.description: Invalid joining code — class not found

409.description: Student already enrolled in this class

get.description: Retrieve a specific enrollment record. Accessible by headmaster and professors.

put.description: Reassign enrollment to a different class or student. Headmaster and professors only.

404.description: Enrollment, Class, or Student not found

409.description: Student already enrolled in that class

delete.description: Removes a student from a class. Headmaster and professors only.

get.description: Returns all subjects available at Hogwarts, each with its parent department included. Accessible by all authenticated roles.

post.description: Add a new spell or subject to the Hogwarts curriculum. Headmaster and professors only.

get.description: Retrieve a specific spell/subject by ID with its department.

put.description: Update a spell/subject. Headmaster and professors only.

delete.description: Remove a spell/subject from the curriculum. Headmaster and professors only.

get.summary: List professors and students related to a subject

get.description: Returns all users on the platform. Headmaster only.

post.description: Headmaster can manually create student, professor, or headmaster accounts.

get.description: Retrieve a specific Hogwarts user. Headmaster only.

put.description: Update a user's details (role, name, avatar). Headmaster only.

delete.description: Permanently removes a user from Hogwarts Academy. Headmaster only.

get.description: Returns departments associated with a professor or student via their classes.
Returns spells and subjects associated with a professor or student.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication endpoints — the Ministry of Magic's approved session management (Better Auth)

tags.name: Classes
tags.description: Hogwarts classes created by professors, joined by students via joining codes or browsing

tags.name: Departments
tags.description: Magical disciplines (e.g., Potions, Charms, DADA). Only the headmaster can create or delete departments

tags.name: Subjects
tags.description: Individual spells and subjects within a department (e.g., Patronus Charm, Polyjuice Potion)

tags.name: Enrollments
tags.description: Track student enrollment in classes. Join via browsing or a professor's joining code

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Hogwarts Academy users — students, professors, and the headmaster. Full CRUD restricted to the headmaster
